title: EventBridge
description: Serverless event bus for routing events between AWS services, SaaS apps, and your own applications. Rules match events and route them to targets like Lambda, SQS, or Step Functions.
practices: Use EventBridge over SNS when you need content-based filtering, scheduling, or cross-account event routing.
Define rules with specific event patterns — avoid catch-all rules that trigger on everything.
Use the default event bus for AWS service events, custom buses for your application events.
EventBridge is accessed via IAM. Producers need events:PutEvents, targets are invoked via resource-based policies.
configNotes: Event bus name — use 'default' for AWS service events or create a custom bus.
Rules define which events to match using event patterns (JSON-based matching).
Schedule expressions support cron and rate syntax for time-based triggers.
